content.en:
North Longze.

The Eternal Realm God Realm powerhouse, Xuan Ze Realm God, returned to Beilongze.

Soon, those half-step Eternal Realm Divine Realms that were still alive in Beilongze came one after another.

"Blood, they've fallen?"

The Xuanze Realm God sat on the Void Throne, his golden eyes staring at the half-step Eternal Realm God Realm below.

"The great Xuanze Realm God, the Blood Ze Dao Lord, they have fallen, and they were killed by the Ye Tian Kingdom Lord of the Ten Thousand Gods Kingdom Alliance. A half-step Eternal Realm God Realm said.

"What's the other party's background?"

The Xuanze Realm God asked.

"No...... I don't know!"

These half-step Eternal Realm God Realm trembled and replied.

"Rubbish!" the Xuanze Realm God said coldly.

However, he also knew that this group of half-step Eternal Realm God Realms was not the opponent of that Ye Tian Kingdom Lord, so he didn't dare to go to the Ten Thousand Gods Realm to investigate.

And the Lone Star Realm Alliance and the Myriad Gods Realm Alliance are far away, and if they rush over, they are naturally very likely to be killed.

"The Kingdom of All Gods Alliance, I remember that not long ago, the Kingdom of All Gods moved to the realm of the Realm of Gods. I'm not very familiar with that guy from the gods, but the other party's strength is not very strong. And the Lord of Ye Tian didn't follow him into the realm of the Realm God Kingdom, there should be no background, and if he kills it, he will kill it!"

The Xuanze Realm God is going to go to the Ten Thousand Gods Kingdom Alliance.

Subsequently.

He said a few words, and 457 prepared to go to the Alliance of the Kingdom of the Gods.

He didn't really care about the blood Ze them, but when he came back this time, he had to come up with something, otherwise other forces or other Eternal Realm God Realm powerhouses would still think that he would be afraid of a half-step Eternal Realm God Realm country lord!

......

"The Xuanze Realm God is shuttling in the direction of the Endless Realm, it seems that he wants to deal with me!"

Ye Tian muttered.

If it was before, he probably would have to avoid the edge for a while, but now, he is not a god of the Xuanze realm.

And.

This time, he wanted to kill the Xuanze Realm God, so that the Xuanze Realm God would die without a place to be buried.

The Endless Realm.

Ye Tian's replica body was dispatched.

One replica body carries the Eternal Pillar, and one replica body carries the Eternal Devouring Spear.

And he dispatched a total of six replica bodies to besiege and kill the Xuanze Realm God together.

In fact, it may be enough for a replica body to carry the Eternal Demon Pillar, but he needs to kill the Xuanze Realm God one hundred percent, so naturally the more copies of the body, the better.

The speed of the Xuanze Realm God was very fast, crossing the Death Zone and arriving at the Eternal Yin Wind Belt.

"Passing through this Eternal Yin Wind Belt, it is very close to the Ten Thousand Gods Kingdom Alliance, after killing the Lord of the Ye Heavenly Kingdom, I will deal with my affairs. "

The Xuanze Realm God muttered.

However.

Just as he was about to shuttle away from the Eternal Yin Wind Belt, the surroundings suddenly became silent, and even the Eternal Yin Wind seemed to have stagnated.

Rumble!!!!

Eternal primordial treasures appeared in the void and sealed off this place.

"Sunrise Domain!"

"Sunrise Domain!"

"Sunrise Domain!"

Ye Tian's replica body descended, and directly used the Ruin Sun Realm to cooperate with his Eternal Origin Treasure to blockade and suppress here.

"Six bodies, I didn't expect you to have so many clones, could it be the clones created by some special Eternal Primordial Treasure?"

The Xuanze Realm God did not panic at all.

After all, no matter how many clones there are, they are only half-step Eternal Realm God Realm strength.

In his opinion, no matter how much half-step Eternal Realm God Realm there was, they were just ants.

"Look for death!"

And Ye Tian directly urged the Eternal Realm Devouring Spear and killed the Xuanze Realm God.

The moment he saw the Xuanze Realm Devouring Spear, the Xuanze Realm God revealed a trace of fear.

"The weapon that the Eternal Realm Devouring Tree Branch turned into, you dare to use such a weapon!"

The Xuanze Realm God was extremely shocked.

He didn't dare to use this kind of thing, even if the Eternal Dao Seed was solidified, it would be absorbed from the power of the Eternal Dao Seed, and his body would be weakened once he used it, and if it took a long time, it would also be possible for the Eternal Demon Seed to turn into an Eternal Demon Seed.

And the half-step Eternal Realm God Realm using the Eternal (CFDJ) Constant Realm Devouring Tree Branch will be even more miserable, and there is a high probability that it will be Eternal Demon Seed.

But Ye Tian is fine, this is amazing!

"Hmph, even the Eternal Realm Devouring Tree can't hurt me, unless your cultivation reaches the Eternal Realm God Realm!!!"

Bang!!!!

The Xuanze Realm God blasted Feiye Tian's copy body with one blow, but the attack of the Eternal Realm Devouring Spear landed on the Xuanze Realm God's body, absorbing a little of his power, and slightly affecting the Eternal Dao Seed of the Xuanze Realm God.

But the impact wasn't huge, so he didn't care.

However.

Just when most of his mind was on the Eternal Realm Devouring Spear, Ye Tian's other copy body urged the Eternal Demon Pillar and cast the Spear of the Ruin Sun, bursting out with all his power and killing the Xuanze Realm God.

This is his real killer feature!

"What, Pillar of Eternity!!!!"

The face of the Xuanze Realm God changed drastically.

The Eternal Realm Devouring Tree is just that, it does not contain powerful energy in itself, and only when the strong hold it in their hands can it burst out with terrifying lethality.

A mere half-step Eternal Realm Divine Realm holding the Eternal Realm Devouring Tree Branch, he was naturally not worried.

But the Eternal Demon Pillar is different, it itself contains energy far beyond the Eternal Realm God Realm, and being able to hold the Eternal Demon Pillar means that it has completely controlled the Eternal Demon Pillar.

But how could the half-step Eternal Realm God Realm master the Eternal Demon Pillar, unless Ye Tian was a demon seed, there would be a glimmer of hope!

However, no matter how Ye Tian looks, he doesn't look like a demon seed, he doesn't have the breath of a demon seed on his body at all, and he can't even see the problem of the eternal Dao seed!

Suddenly.

The Xuanze Realm God thought of a possibility.

"You are the perfect eternal !!!!!"

Only the perfect Eternal Dao Seed is not afraid of the Eternal Dao Seed Demon Seed, and only then can they dare to approach the Eternal Demon Pillar, and only then can they refine the Eternal Demon Pillar.

And even in the realm of the Realm God Kingdom, there are only a few Perfect Eternal Dao Inheritances, and there is a limit to the number of Perfect Eternal Dao Inheritances.

Therefore, in the realm of the Realm God Realm, there are very few powerhouses with perfect eternal Dao species, and they are all terrifying existences that he can't imagine!

And for countless years, I have never heard of the birth of a new Perfect Eternal Dao Inheritance, but I didn't expect to meet one here.

If the news spreads, there will definitely be many strong people who will come to verify it.

Ye Tian didn't answer the words of the Xuanze Realm God, and held the Eternal Demon Pillar and killed directly.

Rumble!!!!!

The Xuanze Realm God couldn't block Ye Tian's Eternal Demon Pillar's blow.

Poof!

One side of his body was directly shattered, and there was something wrong with the Eternal Dao Species.

He wanted to escape, but Ye Tian's other copy bodies intervened and intercepted him.

At this moment, the god body of the Xuanze realm is in a desperate situation.
